chapter_title.en: The Reward of one who Feeds a Believer, Quenches his Thirst, Clothes him or Pays off his Debt

parts.text: وعن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال

text: : أول ما يتحف به المؤمن في قبره أن يغفر لمن تبع جنازته.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 168. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: The first gift that a believer is presented with in his grave is the forgiveness for those who accompanied his bier.
